name: Date Drops 1
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Combine the flour, baking powder, spices, and salt in a bowl.
In another large bowl, cream the vegetable shortening and sugar. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
Gradually blend in the dry ingredients into the butter mixture.
Fold in the dates and walnuts.
Drop spoonfuls of dough 1 1/2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, until lightly colored. Transfer to wire racks to cool.
